svg.text: Evidence that would change the conclusion
Audited GBIF-to-WFO accepted-key projection or admitted sidecar namespace plus source-density controls preserving event signal
Accepted-key modern-failure evidence, multi-source/source-class support, living-megafauna controls, and source-class-independent held-out recovery
Broader trait coverage, phylogenetically separated carrier sets, and family-size/sampling-density controls
Track 4 · Crop wild relatives and climate
Audited crop/CWR BIOCLIM summaries and disjoint candidate-level expert comparator rows
Accepted-key, dated, non-Duke taxon-compound rows across enough families/classes to estimate signatures without source collapse
Approved local/open model weights and documented response rows with scorer diagnostics
